Localization.Description: Adding a value to the properties of the AdminSDHolder container that updates the permissions of protected objects with a certain period of time. This allows an attacker to gain privileged access and gain a foothold in the infrastructure

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} added the value "{object.name}" to the properties of the AdminSDHolder container to gain persistence in the infrastructure or escalate privileges on host {event_src.host}
